title: Exchange Fuels
description: Adds in fuels from ProjectE, ported over to fabric and for 1.19.2!
body:
First of all, please check out: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte as it is an amazing mod, the resources i have used for the textures in this mod, come from here. Please support them!

This is a very small mod for 1.19.2, which adds in the fuels from ProjectE.

The Fuels (Crafting recipes in images):
-Alchemical Coal (Lasts x4 longer than Coal)
-Mobius Fuel (Lasts x4 longer than Alchemical Coal)
-Aeternalis Fuel (Lasts x4 longer than Mobius Fuel)

Ive now added in the blocks from ProjectE aswell.

 

And yes, i may update this to 1.19.3 in the future but as of right now, this is just a small project that i have made for me and my friends to use. (And no, i will not be downgrading it below 1.19.2 either.)
